meta.title: AI Research · 核心论文库
meta.note: 每条 arXiv ID 经 arxiv.org 摘要页实时核对；期刊论文经 Crossref 核对 DOI。链接可跳转。

collections.name: 少样本学习 · 生成式世界模型统一框架
collections.desc: 以「分层生成式世界模型 + 贝叶斯后验更新 + 最小模型改动」为主线组织。人类快速学习 = 在已有生成式世界模型中对潜在解释做快速后验更新。

papers.title: Building Machines That Learn and Think Like People
papers.role: 顶层纲领：直觉物理+组合性+因果生成模型，整个框架的思想母体
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

papers.title: The free-energy principle: a unified brain theory?
papers.role: 统一目标 L(用最小内部模型变化解释最多证据)的理论根
papers.verified: Crossref DOI/作者/年份核对通过

papers.title: Human-level concept learning through probabilistic program induction
papers.role: 强先验/程序归纳：Omniglot 的 BPL，概念=生成程序

papers.title: DreamCoder: Growing generalizable, interpretable knowledge with wake-sleep Bayesian program learning
papers.authors: Ellis, Wong, Nye, Sable-Meyer, et al.
papers.role: 程序归纳+长期θ慢速积累：边解题边长出可复用概念库
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

papers.title: Matching Networks for One Shot Learning
papers.role: 度量学习：注意力+最近邻式一次学习
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

papers.title: Prototypical Networks for Few-shot Learning
papers.role: 原型学习：类中心=原型，少样本估计潜类别中心 z_cat
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

papers.title: Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning for Fast Adaptation of Deep Networks
papers.role: 元学习：学好初始参数=学强先验，新任务几步梯度收敛
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

papers.title: Human-like systematic generalization through a meta-learning neural network
papers.role: 关键拼图：人类组合能力可能是大量任务上元学习出来的，而非纯预置符号

papers.title: Why there are complementary learning systems in the hippocampus and neocortex
papers.role: 海马快/皮层慢：CLS 理论奠基，z_t 快更新 vs θ 慢更新

papers.title: What Learning Systems do Intelligent Agents Need? Complementary Learning Systems Theory Updated
papers.role: CLS 现代版：把回放/巩固接到深度 RL

papers.title: Predictive coding in the visual cortex: a functional interpretation of some extra-classical receptive-field effects
papers.role: 预测误差：预测编码奠基，ε = x - g_θ(z)

papers.title: Hybrid Predictive Coding: Inferring, Fast and Slow
papers.role: 混合预测编码：把快速前馈推断与迭代推断统一
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

papers.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
papers.authors: Brown, Mann, Ryder, Subbiah, et al.
papers.role: ICL：把 few-shot 重定义为 in-context，与经典元学习分道但同目标
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

collections.name: 世界模型 · 工程/RL 谱系
collections.desc: 在学到的环境模拟器内部做规划与试错（想象中训练）。

papers.title: World Models
papers.role: 奠基：V(VAE)+M(RNN)+C(控制器)，在梦里训练
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过

papers.title: Mastering Diverse Domains through World Models (DreamerV3)
papers.role: 通用世界模型 RL：不调超参通吃 100+ 任务，Minecraft 从零挖钻石
papers.verified: arxiv.org 摘要页标题核对通过
